Q4 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The question has 4 statements S1 to S4 followed by 4 conclusions in the form of options ‘a’ to ‘d’.
Identify the conclusion which logically follows from at least one of the 4 statements.
S1 : All senior schools are colleges.
S2 : No university is a play school.
S3 : Some primary schools are senior schools.
S4 : All colleges are universities.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Given that all senior schools are colleges and some primary schools are senior schools which leads to the conclusion that “all those primary schools which are senior schools are colleges” i.e. some of the colleges are primary schools.

Q10 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of these words most nearly means the word provided?
DEPLETE

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Deplete means to reduce or deprive or something essential; exhaust means to consume completely. Hence, 'Exhaust' is closest in meaning to 'Deplete'.

Q34 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statement(s) is/are CORRECT regarding forward or direct extrusion process?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c, d)
• It is simple, but material slide along the chamber wall.
• High friction forces must be overcome, by using molten glass as lubricant.
• It requires high extrusion forces but the process is simple and uncomplicated.
• High scrap or material waste –18 to 20% of billet weight on an average.
